metadata.description: Ready-to-install skills and plugins for Codex and Claude Code.

plugins.name: build-swift-apps
plugins.description: Swift app build, debug, profile, package, App Store, TestFlight, simulator, macOS, iOS, and Xcode workflows.

plugins.name: pixijs
plugins.description: PixiJS v8 application, scene graph, rendering, migration, asset, event, and performance workflows.

plugins.name: tauri
plugins.description: Tauri 2 setup, migration, config security, IPC, plugins, debugging, testing, and distribution workflows.

plugins.name: scientific-research
plugins.description: Source-backed scholarly discovery, deduplication, screening, claim ledgers, and evidence quality gates.

plugins.name: context-density
plugins.description: Context design, long-context placement, prompt-contract audits, skill/plugin compression, and structural handoff.

plugins.name: capability-workbench
plugins.description: Capability discovery, synthesis, portfolio architecture, skill trigger metadata, agent guidance file authoring, vetting, plugin packaging, installation, and marketplace visibility.

plugins.name: codex-cli
plugins.description: Codex CLI operations, automation, diagnostics, live thread supervision, plugin and MCP lifecycle, session log forensics, and local environment actions.

plugins.name: claude-code
plugins.description: Claude Code CLI operations, print-mode automation, diagnostics, plugin and MCP lifecycle, hooks, settings, agents, sessions, and worktrees.

plugins.name: architecture-intelligence
plugins.description: Source-backed code architecture audits, ownership topology, runtime topology, conformance and drift checks, structure metrics, ADRs, fitness functions, dependency boundaries, and refactoring strategy.

plugins.name: design-intelligence
plugins.description: Source-backed product, UX, interaction, hierarchy, accessibility, and design-system judgment.

plugins.name: game-design-intelligence
plugins.description: Gameplay loops, progression, economy, motivation, onboarding, difficulty, multiplayer, and live-service critique.

plugins.name: kotlin-multiplatform
plugins.description: Kotlin Multiplatform architecture, Gradle diagnosis, Compose Multiplatform, interop, testing, data, governance, performance, security, publishing, and release workflows.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development with Spec Kit, traceability, evidence profiles, and completion proof gates.
